result.stdout:
Description:

Usage:
  dotnet promote [command] [options]

Options:
  -l, --label <l>        The new label, or leave blank to promote to a full release.
  -s, --source <s>       Package source (URL, UNC/folder path or package source name) to use. Defaults to DefaultPushSource if specified in NuGet.Config.
  -d, --destination <d>  Package destination (URL, UNC/folder path or package source name) to use. Defaults to source.
  -k, --api-key <k>      The API key for the server.
  -r, --recurse          Whether to recursively promote dependencies
  -?, -h, --help         Show help and usage information
  --version              Show version information

Commands:
  source <NAME>  Releases the specified name and version
  nupkg <NUPKG>  Releases the specified nupkg file
  zip <ZIP>      Releases the specified nupkg files contained in the zip file

result.stdout:
Description:
  Releases the specified nupkg file

Usage:
  dotnet promote nupkg <NUPKG> [options]

Arguments:
  <NUPKG>  The package to promote

Options:
  -?, -h, --help         Show help and usage information
  -l, --label <l>        The new label, or leave blank to promote to a full release.
  -s, --source <s>       Package source (URL, UNC/folder path or package source name) to use. Defaults to DefaultPushSource if specified in NuGet.Config.
  -d, --destination <d>  Package destination (URL, UNC/folder path or package source name) to use. Defaults to source.
  -k, --api-key <k>      The API key for the server.
  -r, --recurse          Whether to recursively promote dependencies

result.stdout:
Description:
  Releases the specified name and version

Usage:
  dotnet promote source [<NAME>...] [options]

Arguments:
  <NAME>  The package(s) to promote

Options:
  -v, --version <v>      The package version to promote. Leave blank to promote the latest pre-release version
  -?, -h, --help         Show help and usage information
  -l, --label <l>        The new label, or leave blank to promote to a full release.
  -s, --source <s>       Package source (URL, UNC/folder path or package source name) to use. Defaults to DefaultPushSource if specified in NuGet.Config.
  -d, --destination <d>  Package destination (URL, UNC/folder path or package source name) to use. Defaults to source.
  -k, --api-key <k>      The API key for the server.
  -r, --recurse          Whether to recursively promote dependencies

commands.payload:
Description:
  Releases the specified name and version

Usage:
  dotnet promote source [<NAME>...] [options]

Arguments:
  <NAME>  The package(s) to promote

Options:
  -v, --version <v>      The package version to promote. Leave blank to promote the latest pre-release version
  -?, -h, --help         Show help and usage information
  -l, --label <l>        The new label, or leave blank to promote to a full release.
  -s, --source <s>       Package source (URL, UNC/folder path or package source name) to use. Defaults to DefaultPushSource if specified in NuGet.Config.
  -d, --destination <d>  Package destination (URL, UNC/folder path or package source name) to use. Defaults to source.
  -k, --api-key <k>      The API key for the server.
  -r, --recurse          Whether to recursively promote dependencies

result.stdout:
Description:
  Releases the specified nupkg files contained in the zip file

Usage:
  dotnet promote zip <ZIP> [options]

Arguments:
  <ZIP>  The zip package containing the packages to promote

Options:
  -?, -h, --help         Show help and usage information
  -l, --label <l>        The new label, or leave blank to promote to a full release.
  -s, --source <s>       Package source (URL, UNC/folder path or package source name) to use. Defaults to DefaultPushSource if specified in NuGet.Config.
  -d, --destination <d>  Package destination (URL, UNC/folder path or package source name) to use. Defaults to source.
  -k, --api-key <k>      The API key for the server.
  -r, --recurse          Whether to recursively promote dependencies
